creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
I had a go at this via these two:
https://reviews.freebsd.org/D45346
https://reviews.freebsd.org/D45345

D45346 may still make sense to support similar cases that may come up in the future, but for this issue moving them to the existing lib/libc/yp/Symbol.map sounds like the right thing.
